description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a boxy silhouette and a visually striking contrast between its light gray, textured seat and back cushions and its deep black, smooth armrests and base. The sofa features two large, square back cushions and two matching seat cushions, all with a subtle grid-like woven pattern that adds visual interest. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend slightly beyond the seat, providing a sturdy and comfortable resting place. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered in the same light gray patterned fabric as the cushions, creating a cohesive look from all angles. The legs are short, blocky, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern two-seater sofa with light gray, textured cushions and bold black armrests and base, featuring a boxy, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, light gray patterned back cushions, matching seat cushions, and wide black armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight black armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the light gray patterned upholstery covering the back of the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at each end, extending slightly above the seat height, fully upholstered in black fabric with a solid, padded appearance.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest formed by two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width, with no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushion separation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray upholstery with a subtle, grid-like woven pattern on the cushions and back, contrasting with the solid black, smooth fabric on the armrests and base.
